notes:
Any attempts no matter the in-game settings would cause it to hang, and I would have to manually shut down my Deck and turn it back on.
In theory, So long as you had a computer that could run the game, you could launch it with Proton-GE and get farther than I did!
This is not a Compatibility issue in the case of proton (As far as I am aware), but it IS a hardware issue in the case of the Steam Deck and attempting to run a heavier weight game.
title: The Veiled Ones

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6600 (radeonsi, navi23, LLVM 18.1.8, DRM 3.59, 6.11.3-200.fsync.fc40.x86_64)
notes: Once I enabled ProtonGE, the game played effectively as it would have Native
title: The Veiled Ones
